description: List of alphabetized names with Greek/Coptic numerals spanning four columns. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Late, 14th- or 15th-century based on the paleography. The son of a nagid is mentioned toward the bottom of the second column: אלח׳ ע׳[אל]עזיז א׳ נגיד. The shelfmark is a multi-fragment with a minute shred of printed material visible in Latin script. Requires further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
